en.name: Crosswordle
en.desc: A creative twist on word puzzles! Swap adjacent letters to form valid words in this engaging crossword-style game. Perfect for vocabulary building and brain training.
en.howToPlay: Click on a letter, then click another letter in a different column to swap them. Each row must form a valid word. Use hints wisely as swaps are limited.
tips: Look for common letter patterns first
Check which letters could start or end words
Use the word list as a reference for valid words
Plan multiple swaps ahead before executing

zh.name: 填字游戏
zh.desc: 文字谜题的创意变体！交换相邻字母组成有效单词，体验这款有趣的填字风格游戏。非常适合词汇积累和大脑训练。
zh.howToPlay: 点击一个字母，然后点击另一列中的另一个字母来交换它们。每行必须形成一个有效的单词。明智地使用提示，因为交换次数有限。
tips: 首先寻找常见的字母模式
检查哪些字母可以开头或结尾单词
使用单词列表作为有效单词的参考
在执行之前提前规划多次交换
